nodes.text: My date of birth? Oh, goodness. March fourteenth, nineteen fifty-seven. Pi Day! My students used to leave little pie charts on my desk. The math teachers thought they were very clever.

responses.text: Can you spell out the year for me?

nodes.text: Nineteen fifty-seven. I'm sixty-seven years old and I have never once been confused about it. Though I appreciate that you're being careful.
Of course it does. Same birthday I've had my whole life. Now, did you want to see my ID as well, or is that enough?

responses.text: ID's already been scanned. We're good.

nodes.text: Efficient. I like that. You know, this really is a good pharmacy.
